data.name: Valentine's Day Bikini Femdom
data.detailed_description:
One year after reuniting with Hinako, your childhood friend, you’re now a couple on the verge of graduation. You decide to take a romantic trip to the beach for Valentine’s Day, but you love Hinako so much that you can’t control your erection. Hinako, in her usual sadistic fashion, offers to relieve your urges, but only if you worship her like a goddess. Being the masochist that you are, you waste no time accepting her offer.

Spend Valentine’s Day with Hinako, your big-breasted childhood friend turned girlfriend, as she showers you with her sadistic love.

Features:

  • ~1.3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character animations

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery featuring all animations in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
